caption: A man wearing a dark academic cap, glasses, and a patterned blue and white garment is captured in a medium shot, gesturing with his right hand. To his right is a blue inset screen featuring another man in a red cap and dark clothing, identified by on-screen text as "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI" and "POLITICAL ANALYST" located in "LAGOS." The overall layout is a news broadcast format from "PLUS TV," with a purple and red branded header. A white banner across the bottom displays the text "PLUS POLITICS" and the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." The bottom of the screen contains a white bar with various links, including "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV," "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE," and social media icons for "PLUSTVAFRICA." Across the sequence, the man in the cap continues his gesturing motion, while the graphics, inset screen, and text remains static.
